parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the invoice to retrieve lien waivers for

items.description: Lien waivers belonging to an invoice

company_id.description: The company_id of the lien waiver

project_id.description: The project_id of the lien waiver

invoice_id.description: The invoice_id of the lien waiver

status.description: The status of the lien waiver

type.description: The status of the lien waiver

locked.description: Boolean flag indicating whether or not the lien waiver is locked

user_name.description: Full name of who requested the unlock
Full name of who unlocked the waiver

sign_url.description: URL with which a user can sign the lien waiver (outside of an iframe context). This will be an empty string unless the user making the request is an invoice contact.

iframe_sign_url.description: URL with which a user can sign the lien waiver (inside of an iframe context). This will be an empty string unless the user making the request is an invoice contact.

pdf_url.description: URL of the current lien waiver document
